title: Goated PvP Totem
description:
Turn your Totem of Undying into a bold, crimson-powered symbol.

This texture replaces the default totem with a dark, shadow-style design surrounded by a strong red aura. Perfect for PvP, hardcore worlds, or anyone who loves an intense red aesthetic.
body:
Turn your Totem of Undying into a bold, crimson-powered symbol.

This texture replaces the default totem with a dark, shadow-style design surrounded by a strong red aura. Perfect for PvP, hardcore worlds, or anyone who loves an intense red aesthetic.

✨ Features

Deep black/dark core design

Clean pixel-art style

Bright red background glow

High contrast for better visibility

Lightweight & performance friendly

🎮 Perfect For

PvP players

Hardcore survival

Red-themed texture packs

Edgy / dark UI setups

📦 Details

Resolution: 16x

Compatible with: Minecraft Java Edition

Works great with red-themed GUIs and resource packs

If you like clean, bold, and aggressive visuals — this one’s for you.
